_doc: PUMP unlock schedule transcribed from defillama.com/unlocks/pump-fun (screenshot dated 2026-05-29). Monthly Community & Ecosystem releases are the only documented forward unlock events as of today. The chart shows a step-up around July 2026 that's likely Team (20%) and Existing Investors (13%) starting to vest, but specific dates/cliff sizes aren't visible from the DL events panel — those buckets are encoded conservatively as estimated linear releases from Jul 2026 forward.

events.note: Visible Apr/May/Jun 2026 monthly releases ($17.39m each, 10b PUMP). 24mo extrapolation against 240b total Community & Ecosystem allocation (24% of max).
Team 20% × 1t = 200b PUMP. Chart shows step-up at ~Jul 2026 then linear release through ~2029. Specific cliff size not visible in DL events panel — encoded as 3y linear from Jul 2026.
Existing Investors 13% × 1t = 130b PUMP. Standard 2y vesting from cliff inferred from chart shape.
